generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The new domestic security expansion isn't about surveillance—it's about giving agents the tools they need to connect dots before attacks happen. My colleagues and I have testified that this would've prevented several near-misses. We can't afford to wait until after the next attack to act. #SecurityFirst
